title: Immunity
author: Jenna Macciochi
subtopics: immune system, sleep, mental health, prevention
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A giant concentric 'shield' or 'cell wall' graphic. Outer ring of graphite, then ash, then a small red core. White blood cells (small white circles with red dots) patrol the rings. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1650)" fill="none">
    <!-- Concentric rings -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="480" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="380" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="280" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="180" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Patrolling white blood cells: small filled circles on the rings -->
    <g fill="#ffffff">
      <circle cx="480" cy="0" r="8"/>
      <circle cx="-340" cy="-340" r="8"/>
      <circle cx="280" cy="280" r="8"/>
      <circle cx="-180" cy="180" r="8"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="-380" r="8"/>
      <circle cx="-100" cy="280" r="8"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Each white cell has a red dot inside -->
    <g fill="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="480" cy="0" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-340" cy="-340" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="280" cy="280" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-180" cy="180" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="-380" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-100" cy="280" r="3"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Ticks (defense lines) pointing inward -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5">
      <line x1="0" y1="-480" x2="0" y2="-520"/>
      <line x1="480" y1="0" x2="520" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="480" x2="0" y2="520"/>
      <line x1="-480" y1="0" x2="-520" y2="0"/>
    </g>
    <text x="0" y="600" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">YOUR INVISIBLE ARMY</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Concentric rings (graphite fading to white) with six small white blood cells patrolling the rings — each with a red dot at its center. The core is a single red dot. The composition reads as a top-down view of a single cell and its immune defenders. Title 520px uppercase, weight 300, sits as a single word at the top — 'IMMUNITY' is the cover.
